codeReview.summary: This fix directly addresses the prior blocking gap by adding deterministic fault-injection tests that force dedupe-check SELECT misses, trigger INSERT UNIQUE conflicts, and then assert recovery behavior from the catch/recovery branches in both sendMessage and replyMessage.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the prior failed feature diff and the fix diff, plus the fix worker transcript skeleton and handoff. The new tests in test/message.test.ts and test/thread.test.ts use db.prepare stubbing to force the pre-INSERT dedupe SELECT to miss, which causes INSERT UNIQUE conflicts and executes recoverCanonicalSend/recoverCanonicalReply paths. Assertions on recoveryReached, canonical IDs/metadata, and no raw SQLITE_CONSTRAINT leakage confirm the previously untested catch/recovery branches are now explicitly and reproducibly exercised for both send and reply flows.
